text: 5. ABBREVIATIONS: AP (acute pancreatitis), BMDM (bone marrow-derived macrophage), CLSM (confocal laser scanning microscope), DAMP (damage-associated molecular pattern), EV (extracellular vesicle), EL (elastase), PcKO (Prdx1-conditioned knockout), Que (Quercetin), SAP (Severe acute pancreatitis), TLR (Toll-like receptor), TAC (taurocholate acid).
heading_context: 3.8 Regulatory mechanism exploration of Ab-Fc-EL-EV@Que against SAP
